name: NRA SR-1 Reduced (100 yd)
notes: 100-yard reduced version of the SR target — used in NRA High Power Match Course.

name: NRA SR-21 (200 yd)
notes: 200-yard NRA Service Rifle target. 7-inch X-ring within 12-inch 10-ring.

name: NRA MR-1 (300 yd)
notes: 300-yard NRA Mid-Range target. 6-inch X-ring within 12-inch 10-ring.

name: NRA LR (600 yd)
notes: 600-yard NRA Long Range target. 12-inch X-ring within 24-inch 10-ring.

name: F-Class F-Open (1000 yd)
notes: 1000-yard F-Class target. 5-inch X-ring within 10-inch 10-ring.

name: F-Class F-T/R (600 yd)
notes: 600-yard F-Class Target Rifle target. 3-inch X-ring within 6-inch 10-ring.

notes: B-16 NRA pistol slow-fire target. Black bullseye on white background.

notes: B-6 NRA pistol slow-fire target.

name: B-27 Silhouette
notes: Standard police-qualification man-shaped silhouette. Scoring rings centered on chest.

notes: USPSA / IPSC competition cardboard target. 'A-zone' scoring.

notes: IDPA standard cardboard target with 8-inch -0 scoring zone.

name: ICORE Pepper Popper
notes: ICORE pepper-popper steel silhouette.

notes: Round 6-inch steel plate. Common 100-300 yard rifle gong.

notes: Round 10-inch steel plate.

notes: White paper bullseye with black 1-inch grid for sighting in.

name: Champion Score-Keeper 100 yd
notes: 100-yard sight-in target. Numbered scoring rings with 1-inch grid.

name: EZ-Aim Splatterburst 8 in
notes: Yellow splatterburst self-adhesive target.
